HUB.TITLE: My Agents
HUB.SUBTITLE: Your AI agents answer customers automatically and hand off to a human when needed.
HUB.ERROR: We couldn't load your agents. Please try again.

EMPTY.TITLE: Create your first agent
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: Build an agent in 3 minutes — you chat, it learns. No technical setup required.

HUB.DELETE_ERROR: We couldn't delete this agent. Please try again.

DELETE_DIALOG.TITLE: Delete agent
DELETE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This removes the agent, its channels, and linked knowledge.

TYPES.PICK_SUBTITLE: Pick a starting point. You can refine everything afterwards.

SUPPORT.TITLE: Support
SUPPORT.SUBTITLE: Answers questions and solves common requests.

SDR.TITLE: Lead qualifier
SDR.SUBTITLE: Qualifies leads and books opportunities for your team.

RECEPTIONIST.TITLE: Receptionist
RECEPTIONIST.SUBTITLE: Greets, triages and routes each conversation.

POST_SALE.TITLE: Post-sale
POST_SALE.SUBTITLE: Onboards new customers and handles follow-ups.

SCHEDULER.TITLE: Scheduler
SCHEDULER.SUBTITLE: Collects day/time preference and hands off to confirm.

REACTIVATION.TITLE: Reactivation
REACTIVATION.SUBTITLE: Re-engages inactive contacts and brings them back.

SCRATCH.TITLE: Start from scratch
SCRATCH.SUBTITLE: Describe what you need and build it from a blank slate.

BUILDER.TITLE: Agent builder
BUILDER.INTRO: Tell us what this agent should do — describe your business and how it should help. We'll ask a few questions and build it for you.
BUILDER.EDIT_INTRO: Describe what you want to change in this agent. The AI keeps the current setup and adjusts only what you ask for.
BUILDER.FAILED: Something went wrong while building your agent. Send another message to try again.
BUILDER.TIMEOUT: This is taking longer than expected. Please send your message again.

ATTACH.LABEL: Attach file
ATTACH.KNOWLEDGE_HINT: Becomes the agent's knowledge (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, JSON, image)
ATTACH.MEDIA_HINT: Material the agent sends to the customer
ATTACH.IMAGE_PENDING: Images attached to your next message

BUILDER.START_ERROR: We couldn't start the builder. Please try again.
BUILDER.SEND_ERROR: Your message couldn't be sent. Please try again.
BUILDER.NO_MATERIALS_SIGNAL: I don't have materials to include right now.
BUILDER.MATERIALS_DONE_SIGNAL: I've added the materials, you can finish.
BUILDER.FINALIZE_SIGNAL: I've finished, you can finalize the agent.
BUILDER.FINALIZE_ERROR: Couldn't finalize the agent. Please try again.

URL_SUGGEST.PROMPT: I saw the link {url}. Add it to {name}'s knowledge?
URL_SUGGEST.ADDED: Link added to knowledge. We're processing it now.
URL_SUGGEST.ERROR: We couldn't add that link. Please try again.

REVIEW.TITLE: Review your agent
REVIEW.FIRST_MESSAGE_HINT: This is a suggestion. Adjust it however you like; it isn't fixed.

PANEL.ERROR: We couldn't load this agent. Please try again.

TEST.DESCRIPTION: Try your agent here. Customers won't see these messages.
TEST.EMPTY: Send a message to see how your agent replies.
TEST.ERROR: The agent couldn't reply. Please try again.
TEST.HANDOFF_NOTICE: Would hand off to a human: {reason}
TEST.NOT_FINALIZED: This agent isn't finalized yet. Finish building it so the test reflects its real behavior.

KNOWLEDGE.TITLE: Knowledge
KNOWLEDGE.SUBTITLE: Add links and files so your agent answers from your own content.
KNOWLEDGE.EMPTY: No knowledge added yet. Add a link or file to get started.
KNOWLEDGE.FORMATS_HINT: PDF, TXT, MD, JSON and links work well. XLSX and DOCX are in beta and may extract less content.
KNOWLEDGE.ADD_SUCCESS: Knowledge added. We're processing it now.
KNOWLEDGE.ADD_ERROR: We couldn't add that knowledge. Please try again.
KNOWLEDGE.REMOVE_ERROR: We couldn't remove that item. Please try again.
KNOWLEDGE.RESYNC_ERROR: We couldn't re-sync that item. Please try again.

MATERIALS.TITLE: Materials
MATERIALS.SUBTITLE: Add what your agent needs to know and what it can send to customers. We review every file and give it a quality score.
MATERIALS.NEED_START: Start the conversation on the left, then attach here (or with the clip) what the agent should know. I review each file and show its status.
MATERIALS.DROP_HINT: Drag files here or click to upload
MATERIALS.EMPTY: No materials yet. Drag a file or click above to get started.
MATERIALS.UPLOAD_ERROR: We couldn't upload that file. Please try again.
MATERIALS.RESEND_ERROR: We couldn't re-upload that material. Please try again.
MATERIALS.REMOVE_ERROR: We couldn't remove that material. Please try again.
MATERIALS.CLOSING: Closing the instruction with your materials…
MATERIALS.BLOCKED_RESEND: Some material needs your attention before continuing.
MATERIALS.BLOCKED_REVIEWING: Reviewing your materials… this only takes a moment.
MATERIALS.BLOCKED_EMPTY: Add a material or use 'Skip' if Iris doesn't need a knowledge base.
MATERIALS.FAILED_REASON: We couldn't process this file. Try re-uploading.
MATERIALS.STEP_PROMPT: Can I use your materials so Iris can learn? Attach files or skip this step.

CHANNELS.ONE_PER_INBOX: Each inbox can have only 1 agent.
CHANNELS.CONNECT_ERROR: We couldn't connect that channel. Please try again.
CHANNELS.DISCONNECT_ERROR: We couldn't disconnect that channel. Please try again.

TUNE.ADVANCED_HINT: Turn on to write the instruction yourself.
TUNE.INSTRUCTION_PLACEHOLDER: Write the instruction for your agent…
TUNE.MANUAL_WARNING: Here you write the instruction. We still apply safety guardrails behind the scenes.
TUNE.GREETING_PLACEHOLDER: Hi! How can I help you today?
TUNE.FALLBACK_PLACEHOLDER: Sorry, I didn't get that. Let me bring in a teammate.
TUNE.SAVE_ERROR: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

INSIGHT.HIGH_HANDOFF_TITLE: Many conversations are being handed off
INSIGHT.LOW_KNOWLEDGE_TITLE: Few answers came from your knowledge base
INSIGHT.BODY: Consider adding knowledge about the topics below to let the agent resolve more on its own:
INSIGHT.BODY_GENERIC: Consider adding more knowledge so the agent can resolve more conversations on its own.

PERFORMANCE.EMPTY: No activity yet. Once your agent starts replying, metrics will appear here.
